workout.name: Ronda Rousey – Static to Grip and Throw
notes: Both partners start static with hands up — the moment you grip, throw immediately with full commitment
Uke (receiver) must tuck chin and breakfall safely on every throw
Start slow to build muscle memory, then increase speed progressively
Drill both left and right sides for each technique
Goal: grip → throw as one fluid motion with zero hesitation

exercises.name: Osoto Gari
exercises.equipment: Partner and Gi (or No-Gi with collar-sleeve grip)
exercises.description: Large outer reap. From static, grip the sleeve and lapel, drive forward, and reap the opponent's far leg backward while breaking their balance to the rear corner.
exercises.cue: Rushing bearhug — get the grip and reap in one explosive motion

exercises.name: Harai Goshi
exercises.equipment: Partner and Gi (or No-Gi with collar-sleeve grip)
exercises.description: Sweeping hip throw. From static, grip and step in, sweeping the opponent's lead leg with your hip and thigh while pulling them forward and over.
exercises.cue: Grip the sleeve, throw your arm up, sweep — all in one motion

exercises.name: O-Goshi
exercises.equipment: Partner and Gi (or No-Gi with collar-sleeve grip)
exercises.description: Large hip throw. Grip, wrap your arm around the opponent's waist with a high grip, step in and pivot, loading them onto your hip and throwing.
exercises.cue: Draw the 'O', ballerina step, grip up your opponent, send them down

exercises.name: Ouchi Gari
exercises.equipment: Partner and Gi (or No-Gi with collar-sleeve grip)
exercises.description: Large inner reap. From static, grip and step between the opponent's legs, reaping the inside of their rear leg while driving their upper body backward.
exercises.cue: Snatch the gi, step inside, reap with commitment

exercises.name: Ko-Soto Gari
exercises.equipment: Partner and Gi (or No-Gi with collar-sleeve grip)
exercises.description: Small outer reap. From static, grip and hook the outside of the opponent's near heel with your foot while pushing their upper body backward to break balance and reap.
exercises.cue: Get that grip and sweep their foot — fast and committed
